mapper.select: SELECT m.*, c.course_name, f.file_name as file_name, f.file_path FROM edu_teaching_material m LEFT JOIN edu_course c ON m.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_file_info f ON m.file_id = f.id WHERE m.id = #{id}

SELECT m.*, c.course_name, f.file_name as file_name, f.file_path FROM edu_teaching_material m LEFT JOIN edu_course c ON m.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_file_info f ON m.file_id = f.id WHERE m.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_teaching_material SET file_id = #{fileId}, audit_status = 0, auditor_id = NULL, auditor_name = NULL, audit_time = NULL, audit_remark = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
